free_text: Study of elastic and inelastic 11B + alpha scattering
and search for cluster states of enlarged radius in 11B
Prelim.data
same data
12C+a reaction
Self-supporting 11B film with thickness of 0.275 mg/cm2
Four dE-E telescope detectors in a
scattering chamber
The differential cross sections for
elastic and inelastic alpha scattering on 11B were
measured at 65MeV alpha energy. The average beam
intensity was about 30 nA (in particles). The
experiment employed a beam monochromatization system,
which provided an energy resolution of approx. 150 keV.
Optical model analysis was performed on the
experimental data, from which root-mean-square radii
for the various excited states of 11B were obtained.
MPT
